page_content:
Recommended: PHIL170.

PHIL282 Free Will & Determinism (3 Credits) A study of the main positions and arguments in the free will debate in contemporary analytic philosophy.

PHIL308 Studies in Contemporary Philosophy (3 Credits)

Problems, issues, and points of view of current interest in philosophy. Prerequisite: 6 credits in PHIL courses.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
